title: Research partner
subtitle: Quickly access, aggregate, and analyze information
when_to_use: Discovery, competitive analysis, entering a new problem space
what_it_can_do: Retrieve and aggregate information from a large number of sources
Summarize complex information into digestible chunks
Explain technical concepts in plain language
try_asking: Summarize the key findings from recent studies on the impact of dark mode on eye strain with citations from reputable sources.
Make a list of the most popular news aggregators and how they differ.
In this tech design document, what are the implications for our UX design?

title: Brainstorm partner
subtitle: Expand thinking and explore divergent possibilities
what_it_can_do: Generate unexpected design solutions
Help you see beyond your usual patterns
Expand half‑formed ideas into more complete concepts
try_asking: Brainstorm three completely different interaction models for onboarding that don’t rely on a tour.
Imagine four workshop formats for Generative Design Day that help teams connect to a sense of play.

title: Crit partner
subtitle: Get detailed critique to identify overlooked issues and strengthen designs via critical feedback
when_to_use: Concepting, planning, strategizing, early design approaches
what_it_can_do: Play devil’s advocate to challenge assumptions
Help anticipate obstacles or difficulties
Provide critical feedback by simulating an expert
try_asking: What might go wrong with this onboarding flow?
What counter‑arguments exist for why we should prioritize this feature?

title: Empathy partner
subtitle: Explore and raise awareness of other perspectives by simulating different points of view
when_to_use: When you need to zoom out
what_it_can_do: Role‑play different personas to understand their viewpoints or feelings
Explore potential emotional reactions to a product, message, or situation
Analyze text for sentiment or emotional tone
try_asking: As a long‑time reader of the New York Times, how would you react to this change?
As a power user who checks this tool daily, what might be your initial impressions of this dashboard design?

title: Polish partner
subtitle: Refine or optimize with minor adjustments
what_it_can_do: Suggest improvements or ways to build upon an existing concept
Help articulate the value and strengths of an idea more clearly
Identify areas where more detail or precision might be needed
try_asking: How can we improve the information hierarchy on this dashboard to make key metrics more prominent?
Suggest three ways to make the error messages in this application more helpful and less alarming for users.

title: Build partner
subtitle: Translate abstract ideas or concepts into more concrete forms
what_it_can_do: Generate images in response to prompts
Write product text in response to requirements
Create programs in response to requirements
try_asking: Build an interest page for readers of The New York Times using React and Tailwind CSS.
Create an application icon of a plate and fork with a clean, modern style.

title: Planning partner
subtitle: Organize tasks, create project plans, structure design activities, and define processes
what_it_can_do: Help structure a complex project or document
Create outlines, agendas, checklists, or step‑by‑step plans
Summarize discussions or key decisions to inform next steps in planning
Break down large tasks into smaller, manageable components
try_asking: Outline the key phases and activities for a two‑week design sprint focused on onboarding.
Identify action items and unassigned tasks from these meeting notes.
